name: Multi-Omics Integration Workflow with Crosslinks
input: Create a flowchart showing a multi-omics data integration study. Three parallel data streams: Genomics (WGS sequencing → Variant calling → SNP/Indel annotation), Transcriptomics (RNA-seq → Differential expression → Pathway enrichment), Proteomics (Mass spec → Protein quantification → Post-translational modifications). All three streams converge at Integration Hub which performs: multi-omics factor analysis (MOFA), network analysis, and causal inference. From Integration Hub, branch to: Biomarker Discovery (candidate selection → validation cohort → clinical utility), Mechanism Insight (pathway modeling → drug target identification), and Publication (manuscript → peer review → journal). Cross-links: Genomics variants inform Transcriptomics DE analysis. Proteomics PTMs validate Transcriptomics findings. Biomarker Discovery feeds back to all three omics streams for targeted validation.
qualityCriteria: Three parallel omics streams visible (Genomics, Transcriptomics, Proteomics)
All three streams converge at Integration Hub
Feedback loop from Biomarker Discovery back to omics streams
Technical terms preserved (MOFA, WGS, RNA-seq, PTMs, SNP/Indel)
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Complex flowchart with 3 parallel columns converging, cross-links as dashed arrows, subgraphs for each omics stream, professional bioinformatics workflow appearance.
